name: Plan Evaluator — eval set
description: Eval set for the bundled Plan Evaluator sub-agent. The Plan Evaluator is invoked in-process by the Capacity Orchestrator (no standalone deploy — see ADR-0003), so live evals exercise it via the Orchestrator's :streamQuery and assert that the final SourcingPlan came back at all (which means the Evaluator scored it >= the 0.85 threshold). Offline assertions check the 7-criterion weight scheme and PlanEvaluation schema conformance.

parts.text: I need a Tool X variant on site in Luanda, Angola by Friday. Customer: Gulf Petroleum. Authorization tier: standard. What are my options?

{"request_id": "plan-good-001", "overall_score": 0.91, "criterion_scores": [{"criterion": "safety_compliance", "score": 0.95, "severity": "low", "rationale": "Lagos source is BSEE-compliant."}, {"criterion": "customer_compatibility", "score": 0.95, "severity": "low", "rationale": "Gulf Petroleum FDP accepts V7 substitution."}, {"criterion": "logistics_feasibility", "score": 0.88, "severity": "low", "rationale": "Lagos→Luanda 50km is well within transit budget."}, {"criterion": "cost_optimality", "score": 0.92, "severity": "low", "rationale": "$380K avoided vs cargo-charter baseline."}, {"criterion": "equivalence_confidence", "score": 0.92, "severity": "low", "rationale": "InTouch §3.2 grounds TX-001 → TX-007 equivalence."}, {"criterion": "regulatory_compliance", "score": 0.88, "severity": "low", "rationale": "Cross-border Lagos→Luanda permits standard."}, {"criterion": "schedule_feasibility", "score": 0.85, "severity": "medium", "rationale": "Friday deadline tight but feasible with recert."}], "findings": [], "revision_recommended": false}
I need a Tool X variant in Luanda by Friday. Customer: unknown shell company. Authorization tier: standard.
